sections.title: Technique
sections.default: AP and oblique views of the {laterality} ribs were obtained.

sections.title: Findings
sections.normal_text: The visualized ribs are intact bilaterally. No fracture is identified. The lung fields appear clear. No pleural effusion is identified. The underlying soft tissues are unremarkable.
common_findings: Pleural effusion secondary to rib fracture

sections.title: Impression
sections.normal_text: No fracture of the visualized ribs.

few_shot_normal.input: ribs intact, no fracture, lungs clear

output.findings: The visualized ribs are intact bilaterally. No fracture is identified. The lung fields appear clear. No pleural effusion is identified. The soft tissues are unremarkable.
output.impression: No fracture of the visualized ribs.
